title: AdsGency Raises $12M in Seed Funding
text:

AdsGency Raises $12M in Seed Funding
USA
AdsGency Raises $12M in Seed Funding
By
FinSMEs
-
October 20, 2025
Facebook
Twitter
WhatsApp
Linkedin
AdsGency
, a San Francisco, CA-based LLM advertising platform that enables AI agents to autonomously run organizations’ entire paid marketing workflow, raised $12m in seed funding.
The round was led by XYZ Venture Capital, with participation from Streamlined Ventures, HF0, Hat-Trick Capital, and more.
The company intends to use the funds to hire engineering talent.
Led by Bolbi Liu, founder and CEO, AdsGency provides a platform that automates everything from creative strategy and competitive analysis to creative development and placement across channels to performance tracking and optimization, driving down costs and improving outcomes for companies of all sizes.
AdsGency’s proprietary agentic orchestration handles strategic planning, multimodal content generation, ad placement across channels, attribution, and optimization. Its platform also integrates with major advertising channels, including TikTok, Instagram, Pinterest, Reddit, and Google, while connecting to enterprise data solutions like Snowflake and CRM platforms such as Salesforce for a secure experience.
Current customers include TAL Education, Halliday, Pika, and Mobvoi.
